title: Gendos selfish attempt
wikitext:
[]: Gendo's selfish attempt.             Quote Post by Titanium » Fri Nov 04, 2011 2:04 am Now, due to the fact that I've only seen Evangelion once or twice, it's been a little foggy. When replying to another post here, it reminded me of the idea that the only reason why the impacts occurred is because of Gendo's doing. Yup. Everything. The Impacts. NERV. SEELE. GHERIN. The Angels. The Katsuragi Expidition. All manufactured. Just so Gendo could be with his beloved Yui. Discuss. Hey, don't be hating, it's an idea. A theory.

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Fri Nov 04, 2011 2:10 am I thought Seele wants Impact to happen too? Even if Gendou were not around, it will definitely see to it 3rd Impact should happen....

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Fri Nov 04, 2011 2:18 am Your theory is flawed.

[]:             Quote Post by Titanium » Fri Nov 04, 2011 2:20 am symbv wrote: I thought Seele wants Impact to happen too? Even if Gendou were not around, it will definitely see to it 3rd Impact should happen....

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Fri Nov 04, 2011 4:48 am The impacts and such were already in the works before Gendo got involved at all. He and Yui both had a role in shaping them but originally were trying to STOP it from the inside. He only switched to the hijack instrumentality plan when Yui left him behind to make her own bid at running the show.

[]: Re: Gendo's selfish attempt.             Quote Post by Reptile » Mon Jan 02, 2012 4:35 pm Titanium wrote: Now, due to the fact that I've only seen Evangelion once or twice, it's been a little foggy. When replying to another post here, it reminded me of the idea that the only reason why the impacts occurred is because of Gendo's doing. Yup. Everything. The Impacts. NERV. SEELE. GHERIN. The Angels. The Katsuragi Expidition. All manufactured. Just so Gendo could be with his beloved Yui. Discuss. Hey, don't be hating, it's an idea. A theory.

[]:             Quote Post by Na7e » Mon Jan 02, 2012 7:30 pm No. Like Nemz said earlier. He really only became after Yui left him behind. Even then it was only to be re-united his wife. God really wasn't his priority.
summary: []: Gendo's selfish attempt.             Quote Post by Titanium » Fri Nov 04, 2011 2:04 am Now, due to the fact that I've only seen Evangelion once or twice, it's been a little foggy. When replying to another post here, it reminded me of the idea that the only reason why the impacts occurred is because of Gendo's doing. Yup. Everything. The Impacts. NERV. SEELE. GHERIN.
